{{Infobox concept
| name = Emperor’s Intent
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

''See also: [[Emperor’s Intent Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] is a potent force of will and authority wielded by the [[Aurelian Emperor]]. It manifests as an invisible, magnetic power that can compel others to obey and even influence the physical world. This force is strong enough to overwrite the wills of ordinary people, protect objects from destruction—such as a bed designed to withstand attacks—and serve as a defensive barrier against weapons. [[The Emperor]] can channel this power through various items, including his crown and armor, or use it to warp materials like [[steel]]. Beyond its immediate application as a tool of command or combat, [[the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] can be stored or left behind. He created a device to hold an echo of his personality through his [[Intent]], intended to bolster his resolve against corruption. Even after his death, traces of his will persist; for instance, he left specific commands regarding the release of the [[Regents]] and used his [[Intent]] to influence the design of certain rooms to disperse the force. While it is a formidable power that can be used for both protection and destruction, it can also be a burden to those who attempt to draw upon it, potentially submerging their own identity in his.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] honed his [[Intent]] on the [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]’s [[Intent]] is a powerful authority that can be channeled through a crown and utilized by [[the Emperor]] himself. While it has the capacity to reinforce armor for centuries, it once acted to glue armor directly onto [[Calder]], an authority that [[Calder]] sought to avoid wrestling with. Although [[the Emperor]] used this power to halt a blow from Urg'naut, attempting to read the [[Intent]] is considered an exercise in folly. Any [[Reader]] who tries to read an [[Imperial]] relic risks being overwhelmed by the force, though it can be resisted through habit.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] can be channeled through a crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] can be used by [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Reading]] the [[Emperor’s Intent]] is described as an exercise in folly.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] is an authority that [[Calder]] wishes to avoid wrestling with.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c13">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor’s Intent]] glued the armor to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] can be resisted as a matter of habit.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]] used [[Intent]] to stop a blow from Urg'naut.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Emperor’s Intent]] can reinforce armor for centuries.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Any [[Reader]] attempting to [[Read]] an [[Imperial]] relic may be overwhelmed by [[the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] can press down on a [[Reader]]'s awareness for centuries.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] was unprepared for slamming his brain into the [[Emperor’s Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Emperor’s Intent]] provides protection that [[Bastion]] was unable to pierce.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
